step_rationale: LDL composition; increased proportion indicates atherogenic lipid shift.
mechanism: Elevated LDL triacylglycerol content indicates atherogenic lipoprotein remodeling that promotes intimal retention and oxidation.

references.title: Plant Stanol Esters Reduce LDL (Low-Density Lipoprotein) Aggregation by Altering LDL Surface Lipids: The BLOOD FLOW Randomized Intervention Study.
